ddls:
CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare facility */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare facility */,
  "federal_provider_number" TEXT /* Federal provider number assigned to the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the facility is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the facility is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., nursing home, specialty care center) */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds in the facility */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the facility */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data_residents" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 record for residents */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare facility */,
  "total_confirmed" INTEGER /* Total confirmed COVID-19 cases among residents */,
  "total_suspected" INTEGER /* Total suspected COVID-19 cases among residents */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths among residents from any cause */,
  "total_covid_deaths" INTEGER /* Total COVID-19 related deaths among residents */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reporting period */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered residents */,
  "vaccinated_cases" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinated residents */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission for the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_residents_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reporting_periods ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_residents_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data_staff" (
  "staff_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 record for staff */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare facility */,
  "total_confirmed" INTEGER /* Total confirmed COVID-19 cases among staff */,
  "total_suspected" INTEGER /* Total suspected COVID-19 cases among staff */,
  "total_covid_deaths" INTEGER /* Total COVID-19 related deaths among staff */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reporting period */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered staff */,
  "vaccinated_cases" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinated staff */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission for the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_staff_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_staff_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reporting_periods ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_capacity" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare facility */,
  "total_occupied_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of occupied beds in the facility */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reporting period */,
  "available_beds" INTEGER /* Number of available beds */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds */,
  "icu_occupied_beds" INTEGER /* Number of occupied ICU beds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_capacity_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_capacity_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reporting_periods ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_periods" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting instance */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare facility */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report submission */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time of the report submission */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., submitted, pending) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_periods_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, facility staff, state official) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare facility */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., critical, informational) */,
  "sent_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_health_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the health official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official within the health department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the official */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the health department */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)
